npc_multitext.name: iq

multitext.name: outlook_d

statelabels.state: Aggressive and will attack if provoked or hungry.
Ignores other creatures unless interfered with or attack.
Altruistic, has an unselfish regard for the interests of others, often to the extent of risking his own safety.
Attacks cloest living creature until it is destroyed.
Does not believe that danger or misfortune exists for it.
Not only hostile, but delights in death, pain, and suffering.
Desires power, attempts to control or dominate other creatures.
Opposed to "evil" (e.g., those who are cruel, hostile, belligerent, etc.); supportive of those who are "good".
Will attack or attempt to steal from other creatures if the risk does not seem too high.
Normally attacks other creatures on sight.
If hungry, will attack anything edible; otherwise Normal.
Inquisitive/Curious will approach and examine unusual situations.
Normally bolts at any sign of other creatures.
Watches and is wary of other creatures, will sometimes attack if hungry.
Ignores the presence of other creatures unless threatened.
Mischievous/Playful, will attempt to play with or play pranks on other creatures.
Protective of a thing, place, other creature, etc.
Skittish around other creatures, runs at the slightest hint of danger.
They are never encountered without a mission.

npc_strfield.name: climate
locale
npc_strfield.script: function Locale() local codes = getValue(); local code, t = "", ""; local txt = ""; if string.find(codes, "SS") then codes = string.gsub(codes, "SS", ""); txt = "Burial Areas"; end local txts = { E="Enchanted/magical places", K="Cross-over points between dimensions", N="Near villages/towns/cities/castles", V="Volcanic areas", X="cavern complexes", Y="battlefields/shipwrecks", t="rural/inhabited/cultivated areas", a="cave entrance/overhangs/lairs", s="burial areas", n="ruins", B="Breaks/Wadis", F="Freshwater coasts & banks", G="Glacier/snowfield", I="tropical Islet/reef/atoll", L="Lake/river", M="Marsh/swamp", O="Ocean", Q="oasis/isolated water sources", S="Saltwater shores/shallows", Z="Desert (perhaps scattered cactus & shrubs, no grass)", A="Alpine/high altitude/mountainous", R="Rough/Rugged/Rocky hills", U="Underground (caverns, etc.)", W="Waste/barren", C="Coniferous forest/taiga", D="Deciduous/coniferous/mixed forest", H="Heath/scrub/moor", J="Jungle/rain forest", P="Plains/grassland (often with scattered trees and scrubs)", T="Tundra (lichen/mosses, lichen/grasses)" } for i=1,string.len(codes),1 do code = string.sub(codes,i,i); if txts[code] ~= nil then if txt=="" then txt = txts[code]; else txt = txt..", "..txts[code]; end end end window.locale_txt.setValue(txt); end function onValueChanged() Locale(); end function onInit() if super and super.onInit then super.onInit(); end onValueChanged(); end
